title: Senior Doctor - 3M India Healthcare - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - 3M India Healthcare - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? 3M India Healthcare in Agra offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About 3M India Healthcare:
3M India Healthcare is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 3M India Healthcare!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
